final_prompt.prompt:
Create a social media avatar/profile picture for a content creator focused on new energy vehicles, digital products, and lifestyle goods (all in-image text in Chinese).

Style/medium: needs a globally harmonious, culturally neutral aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be centered, works as circular crop and square crop for cross-platform use
Subject: must include abstract or symbolic representation of new energy vehicles, digital tech, and lifestyle themes — exact visual metaphor is yours
Scene/backdrop: needs a clean, non-distracting background — exact treatment is yours
Lighting/mood: needs a professional, approachable atmosphere — exact light quality is yours
Color palette: needs a globally harmonious direction avoiding region-specific color taboos — exact color choices are yours
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: must include all in-image text in Chinese by default; must avoid symbols, colors, or imagery that could offend specific cultural/religious groups; must work harmoniously on both Chinese and international social platforms
Avoid: must avoid religious symbols, politically sensitive imagery, region-specific taboo colors, and culturally exclusive visual elements
